notes: Prompt lab: each effect has variants[]; baker scores loudness/duration and promotes winner. Re-run: npm run radio:sfx:lab

variants.prompt: Single sharp plastic PTT button click on a modern digital police radio mic, very short mechanical click then tiny electronic arming blip, dry close-mic recording, no static, no voice, no music, clean, professional, under 0.5 seconds of action
Motorola-style radio transmit key press: crisp tactile click, subtle relay tick, soft carrier rise, dry, no speech, no music, short stinger only
Dispatch console footswitch or desk mic key-up: solid short click and soft beep chirp, control room, dry, no voice, no music
Police radio unkey: short button release click and brief soft electronic drop, dry, no voice, no music, clean
Two-way radio PTT release click only, mechanical, very short, dry studio, no static roar, no voice
VHF radio squelch opens: brief rush of white noise that quickly settles to quieter open-channel hiss, authentic police portable radio, no voice, no music, not harsh, not explosion
Soft FM radio squelch open whoosh, short noise bloom then calm, handheld transceiver, subtle, dry-ish, no talking
End of radio transmission squelch tail: short soft static puff that dies immediately, classic two-way radio unkey noise, no voice, no music, subtle
Handheld radio squelch crash short tail, gentle, authentic, no words, no music
Continuous soft VHF open-channel radio static hiss only, steady low-level white noise bed, police radio monitor speaker, no beeps, no voice, no music, loopable, quiet background ambience, even level
Quiet radio room speaker with gentle RF hiss and tiny occasional soft crackle, very low volume texture, continuous, no talking, no music, suitable as under-voice bed
Subtle analog radio noise floor, smooth continuous static, not wind, not rain, not crowd, pure channel hiss, loop friendly
Short soft multipath radio crackle and flutter as if a distant unit is fringe, police radio, no voice, no music, brief, subtle
Brief radio interference crackle pops, gentle, handheld radio fringe, dry-ish, no speech
911 call center headset line connects: soft click then tiny soft connect tone, modern VoIP telephony, clearly a telephone not a walkie-talkie, no ringing loop, no radio squelch, no voice, no music
Telephone call answered on a call-taker headset, soft off-hook click and brief soft dial-tone-ish blip that stops, office PSAP, NOT radio, no voice
Landline style soft pickup click into quiet open phone line, call center, gentle, no ring, no radio static, no speech
Soft telephone hang-up click on a headset, call center, single click, NOT radio, no busy signal, no voice, no music
Phone call disconnect click, modern soft, telephony, clean, short

Quiet continuous telephone line ambience for a 911 headset: soft electrical line hiss and faint room tone, clearly phone not radio, even level, loopable, no voice, no music, no beeps, audible but soft
Open phone line noise floor, gentle analog hiss with tiny low hum, call center, continuous bed, not silent, not loud, no speech, no music
Soft PSTN open-line atmosphere, quiet broadband hiss suitable under a phone conversation, telephony character, no radio crackle, no voice
Soft American telephone busy signal, two-tone repeating a few times, moderate quiet level, no voice, no music, classic telephony
Quiet US busy signal on phone line, short, clean, not harsh, call center
